api.title: Sorry, something went wrong
api.detail: We can't continue right now. Please try again later.

scoringLessDisagree.title: Would you like to continue with a lower amount?
scoringLessDisagree.detail: We are currently unable to offer you the selected amount. However, you may still continue with a lower amount.

branch.title: Let’s meet in person
branch.detail: Do you have any questions? Call our Helpline or visit one of our branches

contractDisagree.title: Unfortunately, we can't proceed without your consent...
contractDisagree.detail: Do you have any questions? Give us a call or visit us at the nearest branch.

iconBullets.text: Find everything about credit cards on www.moneta.cz/ucty-a-karty/kreditni-karta.

maxLimitReached.title:
You’ve reached the maximum amount we can offer you on your credit card.

Would you like to apply for a loan?

calculator.title: Increase credit card limit
calculator.detail: Increase your credit limit up to {maxLimit} fully online, without visiting a branch.

slider.minIncreaseInfo: You must increase the limit by at least CZK 2,000.

calculator.info:
You will keep your physical credit card.
Only your credit limit will be increased.

disagree.title: Are your personal details incorrect?
disagree.detail: We obtain this information from the state population registers. If any of your details are incorrect, please contact any Czech POINT office, where you can request a correction.

CC_CLIP_SZR_INVALID_IDCARD.title: Your ID card is invalid or blocked
CC_CLIP_SZR_INVALID_IDCARD.description:
Unfortunately, we can’t continue without a valid ID.
Please apply for a new one at the appropriate authority. The details will then be automatically updated in Smart Bank.

CC_CLIP_SZR_TO_BRANCH.title: Let's solve this at the branch
CC_CLIP_SZR_TO_BRANCH.description: Do you have any questions? Call us or visit the nearest branch.

CC_CLIP_SZR_NOK.title: We’re sorry, this service is currently unavailable for this account
CC_CLIP_SZR_NOK.description: An increase to your credit limit is currently not available for this account. We’ll be happy to help you on our customer support line or at a branch.

list.title: Pokud máte více příjmů, můžete je nyní doplnit
list.detail: Pokud nejde o vaše příjmy, odstraňte je.
list.incomeFooter: Podle příchozí platby od {0} z účtu {1}
list.taxBase: Výše rozdílu (základ daně za minulý rok)

addMoreIncomes.title: Přidat další příjem
addMoreIncomes.detail: Přidáním všech vašich příjmů můžete přispět ke kladnému vyhodnocení vaší žádosti.

incomeSource.title: Jaký je váš zdroj příjmů?
incomeSource.footer: Pokud máte příjmů více, budete je moci přidat v dalších krocích žádosti.

TO_SME.title: Hledáte úvěr pro podnikání?
TO_SME.detail: Sjednejte si neúčelový úvěr pro podnikatele. Do {loanAmount} navíc bez daňového přiznání.
bullets: Možnost odpočtu úroků úvěru z daňového základu

entrepreneur.title: Detaily o vašem podnikání
entrepreneur.taxBase: Výše rozdílu (základ daně za minulý rok)
entrepreneur.taxBaseInfoMessage: Zadejte základ daně z minulého roku. Najdete ho v daňovém přiznání. V případě, že uplatňujete paušální daň, zastavte se za námi na pobočku kde s Vámi žádost dokončíme.
entrepreneur.line101LastTaxationPeriodIncomeInfoMessa: Zadejte částku z řádku 101 z daňového přiznání z minulého roku. V případě, že uplatňujete paušální daň, zastavte se za námi na pobočku kde s Vámi žádost dokončíme.
entrepreneur.unpaidTaxForLastYearInfoMessage: Zadejte skutečnou daň z příjmu z řádku 91 z daňového přiznání z minulého roku.
entrepreneur.taxInfoMessage: Po uplatnění slevy podle paragrafu 35c zákona ř. 71 - ř. 73

incomeSources.title: Jiný
incomeSources.detail: (DPP, DPČ, podpora v nezaměstnanosti a jiné)

EMPLOYMENT_INCOME.title: Jaký je váš současný zaměstnavatel?
EMPLOYMENT_INCOME.hint: Napište alespoň 3 písmena z názvu zaměstnavatele, včetně diakritiky.

BUSINESS_INCOME.title: Doplňte údaje o Vašem podnikání
BUSINESS_INCOME.hint: Napište alespoň 3 písmena z názvu subjektu, včetně diakritiky.

RENT.title: Kdo vám rentu vyplácí?
RENT.hint: Napište alespoň 3 písmena z názvu zaměstnavatele, včetně diakritiky.

EMPLOYMENT_INCOME.title: Jaký je váš příjem ze zaměstnání?
EMPLOYMENT_INCOME.detail: Pokud máte každý měsíc jiný příjem, zadejte průměr za poslední tři měsíce.
EMPLOYMENT_INCOME.description: Chcete si to v klidu spočítat? Dejte si načas, vaši žádost najdete uloženou na Přehledu Smart Banky.

PARENTAL_ALLOWANCE.title: Jaká je výše vašeho rodičovského příspěvku

MATERNITY_ALLOWANCE.title: Jaká je výše vaší peněžité pomoci v mateřství

OLDAGE_PENSION.title: Jaká je výše vašeho starobního důchodu?

DISABILITY_PENSION.title: Jaká je výše vašeho invalidního důchodu

RENTAL_OFF_TAX_RETURN.title: Jaká je výše vašeho příjmu z pronájmu

MAINTENANCE_ALLOWANCE.title: Jaká je výše vašeho příjmu z výživného

invalidIncomeCombination.title: Je nám líto, ale půjčku vám bohužel nabídnout nemůžeme
invalidIncomeCombination.detail: Pokud chcete, můžete se vrátit zpět a své příjmy ještě jednou zkontrolovat.

householdSolvency.title: What is the net monthly income of your household?
householdSolvency.detail: Enter the net monthly income of all members of your household. If your income varies from month to month, provide the average from the last three months.
householdSolvency.description: Want to take your time and do the math? No rush — your application is saved in the Smart Banka Overview.

dependents.title: How many dependents do you have?
dependents.detail: A dependent is anyone who relies on your income — even partially — such as children, a partner on parental leave, or a person with a disability you care for.  How many people close to you would be affected by a reduction in your income?

householdExpensesNecessary.title: What other personal expenses do you have?
householdExpensesNecessary.necessaryExpensesSection: What essential expenses do you cover as a loan applicant?
householdExpensesNecessary.necessaryExpensesInfo: Only include the expenses — or the portion of them — that you personally cover. Essential expenses are those that are necessary and unavoidable.
householdExpensesNecessary.installmentsSumSection: Are you currently repaying a lease or loan with a provider other than MONETA Money Bank?

necessaryExpensesError.title: Your essential monthly expenses are higher than your income.
necessaryExpensesError.detail: You may have included rent or mortgage payments. We're mainly interested in your essential monthly living expenses.

richBullets.title: Food, clothing, internet bills, insurance, and housing costs (such as rent, utilities, water, and other services)
Children’s education (nurseries, kindergartens, schools, lunches, after-school programs, extracurricular activities)
Please do not include loan repayments, mortgages, or wage garnishments.

otherInfoExtended.title: Now the small details:
otherInfoExtended.detail: Please select a form of ID which you could present at one of our branches.

scoringAgreement.title: Just one consent left
scoringAgreement.detail:
By selecting „Continue“, you submit your application to increase your credit card limit to the amount stated above.

In order to process your application, we are required to process your personal data and assess your creditworthiness and payment history. This includes verifying information in the Banking Client Information Register, the Non-Banking Client Information Register, and, where applicable, in other databases necessary for the assessment of your creditworthiness.

By continuing, you grant your consent to the collection and processing of the above-mentioned information for the purposes of reviewing your application and concluding the contractual relationship.

scoring.title: Just a minute. We must review everything
scoring.detail: We'll be right back with you.

scoringMore.title: We can increase your credit card limit even more
scoringMore.tip: Having a reserve can be useful. The increased amount will be available to you, but it is up to you how much you use each month.
scoringMore.headlineMore: Our offer with a higher limit
scoringMore.calculator: Borrow a different amount up to {0}

purpose.title: Our clients most often use their credit card reserve for:

calculatorSheet.title: How much would you like to borrow?

scoringOk.title: Everything is in order. You can continue

scoringLess.title: We can increase your credit card limit by a smaller amount. Is that OK?

manualCheck.title: Now we need to review everything
manualCheck.detail:
Since this might take a moment, you can return to Overview.
We’ll send you a text as soon as everything’s ready.

scoringNok.title: Unfortunately, we cannot increase your credit card limit after reviewing your application
scoringNok.detail:
{0}

If you have any questions about next steps, please contact us.

firstUpload.title: Let’s deal with it. Please provide us with your current identification documents.
firstUpload.detail: A clear and legible photograph should suffice. You can do it within the app or visit our branch.
firstUpload.secondaryButton: I want to visit a branch

anotherUpload.title: Thank you for your patience
anotherUpload.detail: We are sorry that we could not tell you sooner, but we are going to need another document. A clear and legible photograph should suffice. You can do it within the app or visit our branch.
anotherUpload.secondaryButton: I want to visit a branch

poorUpload.title: Some documents could not be processed
poorUpload.secondaryButton: I want to visit a branch

branchNeeded.title: We have to meet
branchNeeded.detail:
We are sorry that there is no other way, but we would like to see you at our branch.
We can finish the application together and we will send you the money as soon as it is signed. Please bring with you :
branchNeeded.primaryButton: I understand; show me the nearest branch

uploadCheck.title: We’re going to check legibility and get back to you
uploadCheck.detail: Your documents should be checked within 15 minutes or by the following business day. As soon as we are ready to continue, we will let you know via SMS. The application has been saved and can be found under Balance Overview.

photoCapture.title: Vyfoťte přední stranu občanského průkazu
photoCapture.detail: Platný doklad, za dobrého osvětlení, ostře a nerozmazaně.

photoCapture.title: Vyfoťte zadní stranu občanského průkazu
photoCapture.detail: Platný doklad, za dobrého osvětlení, ostře a nerozmazaně.

review.title: Skvělá fotka! Přečetli jsme vše správně?

personalData.title: Vámi poskytnuté údaje ověříme zároveň v základních registrech. Více o jejich fungování na webu Správy základních registrů a Monety Stisknutím tlačítka Pokračovat potvrzujete, že všechny uvedené informace jsou pravdivé, úplné, správné a aktuální.

busyLoader.title: Chvilku strpení, všechno to musíme zkontrolovat

uploadDocumentResultUploadAgain.title: Jejda, tohle se nepovedlo
uploadDocumentResultUploadAgain.detail: Vyfoťte prosím dokument znovu, za dobrého osvětlení, ostře a nerozmazaně.

photoCapture.title: Vyfoťte přední stranu řidičského průkazu
photoCapture.detail: Platný doklad, za dobrého osvětlení, ostře a nerozmazaně.

13.title: Podepsané Potvrzení o výši příjmu
13.detail: Stáhněte si Potvrzení o výši příjmu a nechte si ho u zaměstnavatele vyplnit a podepsat. Půjčku jsme Vám teď uložili. Do 30 dnů se můžete kdykoli vrátit, podepsané potvrzení tady vyfotit a pokračovat.

112.title: Výplatní doklad od České pošty (složenka), který není starší než 30 dnů

documentUpload.chooseDocTitle: Vyfoťte prosím jeden z následujících dokladů
documentUpload.chooseDocDetail: Půjčku jsme Vám uložili. Do 30 dnů se můžete kdykoli vrátit, doklad vyfotit a pokračovat

uploadedDocuments.title: Please take a picture of both sides of your ID. The process is secure.
labels: Attach the front page of your ID
Attach the back page of your ID

uploadedDocuments.title: Download this form and have your employer fill it out and sign it. The application has been saved. You can come back any time in 30 days, upload the signed form, and continue.
labels: Attach a signed proof of income

uploadedDocuments.title: Please take a picture of front side of your diving licence. The process is secure.
labels: Attach the front page of your driving licence

uploadedDocuments.title: Please take a picture of the following:
uploadedDocuments.title2: . The application has been saved, you come back any time in 30 days, and continue.

documents.title: Payment receipt from the Czech Post that is not older than 30 days

uploadPicker.title: Choose a way to upload a document

documentUploadRetry.title: Oops, that didn’t work
documentUploadRetry.detail: We couldn’t read your data. Please make sure you’re taking the photo in good lighting and the text is sharp and readable.

scoringSummary.title: New settings for your credit card
scoringSummary.agreementTitle: I acknowledge that the minimum monthly payment will increase according to the new credit limit.
scoringSummary.agreementDetail: You can find the amount on your credit card statement.
scoringSummary.agreementRequired: You must accept the agreement to continue.

waitingBeforeContract.title:
Please wait,
we are preparing the updated documents

contract.title: Please read the addendum to your credit card agreement
contract.detail: You can find all documents in Smart Banka and Internet Banka in the Documents section.

signByUs.title: Just a moment, we are signing the contract

paymentOrder.title:
Done!
Your credit card limit has been increased
paymentOrder.detail:
You will continue to repay your card by bank transfer, as before.

You can find the payment details in your credit card statement and in the contract details.

directDebitInternalFull.title:
Done!
Your credit card limit has been increased
directDebitInternalFull.detail:
You will continue to repay your card by 100% direct debit, as before.

You can find the payment details in your credit card statement and in the contract details.

directDebitInternalMin.title:
Done!
Your credit card limit has been increased
directDebitInternalMin.detail:
You will continue to repay your card by minimum direct debit, as before.

You can find the payment details in your credit card statement and in the contract details.

directDebitExternal.title: All set on our side. Please increase your direct debit limit now
directDebitExternal.detail: To ensure your next credit card payment is processed successfully, please increase your direct debit limit.
